theses.headline: RBI's Monetary Policy Committee cuts repo rate 50 bps to 5.00% in surprise off-cycle move
theses.status_reason: Edge score 79 lands in the 60-80 provisional band: trigger clarity is high (scheduled prints), but the variant departure is moderate and partially covered by one contrarian house.
theses.routing_reason: Edge is real but moderate: one house partially covers the timing leg, and the magnitude is in the +4-6% EPS range rather than a step-change.
theses.next_action: Surface candidates; monitor falsifiers; consider handoff of the top expression once its data pool is populated.
theses.falsification_sentence: If 3-month AAA HFC commercial-paper yields have not declined by at least 25 bps from their 2026-06-09 level by 2026-08-15, the funding-cost transmission this thesis depends on is not occurring.
theses.convergence_trigger: Q2 FY27 results season for listed housing-finance companies (first full quarter carrying the lower funding costs)
